# 后端

#### 一、流程数据存储位置


**场景1**: 流程数据和业务域现有天舟云配置数据共库(**推荐方式**)


- 注册系统信息到流程引擎

```
INSERT INTO clcp.obj_http
(id, http_name, http_code, http_desc, http_host, http_type, http_base_url, auth_type, auth_config, is_enabled, is_deleted, tenant_id, app_id, crt_user, crt_name, crt_time, crt_host, upd_user, upd_name, upd_time, upd_host, product_id, tags, todo_prefix)
VALUES('ee31f34422a046af8841cb7db7eea388', '项目名', '项目名标识-唯一', '', 'xxx.gz.cvte.cn', 'https', NULL, 'iac', '{"appId":"xxx","appSecret":"xxx"}', '1', '0', '租户id', '2a1fe9c4-4f65-419c-bd4e-3aa18d3b6e58', 'yeduanwang', '叶端旺', '2025-01-21 16:15:23.803', '172.17.212.249', 'yeduanwang', '叶端旺', '2025-01-21 16:16:22.229', '172.17.212.249', NULL, 'integrated', '待办域名前缀');
```


**场景2**: 流程数据在全新库上存储 (后续配置数据分散，不利于维护，需慎重评估)
步骤：


- 天舟云开新租户


- 增加新租户配置
- 初始化新租户表


- 注册系统信息到流程引擎

```
INSERT INTO clcp.obj_http
(id, http_name, http_code, http_desc, http_host, http_type, http_base_url, auth_type, auth_config, is_enabled, is_deleted, tenant_id, app_id, crt_user, crt_name, crt_time, crt_host, upd_user, upd_name, upd_time, upd_host, product_id, tags, todo_prefix)
VALUES('ee31f34422a046af8841cb7db7eea388', '项目名', '项目名标识-唯一', '', 'xxx.gz.cvte.cn', 'https', NULL, 'iac', '{"appId":"xxx","appSecret":"xxx"}', '1', '0', '租户id', '2a1fe9c4-4f65-419c-bd4e-3aa18d3b6e58', 'yeduanwang', '叶端旺', '2025-01-21 16:15:23.803', '172.17.212.249', 'yeduanwang', '叶端旺', '2025-01-21 16:16:22.229', '172.17.212.249', NULL, 'integrated', '待办域名前缀');
```


#### 二、工程SDK接入


```
业务系统pom文件引入
```


```
<dependency>
   <groupId>com.cvte.csb</groupId>
   <artifactId>csb-statemachine-sdk</artifactId>
   <version>1.4.8.1.PLUS-SNAPSHOT</version>
</dependency>
```


#### 三、融合流程审批能力 (**按需选择**)


1、SdkSmWorkFlowClient: 执行类客户端(**必需**)


```
 流程操作工具类：包含 提交、通过、驳回、废弃、转办等
```


2、sdkSmWorkFlowConfClient: 配置类客户端(**非必需**)


```
 流程配置工具类：用于在业务系统快速创建流程配置数据
```


参考代码


```
package com.cvte.cplm.object.core.tzc.client;

import com.cvte.cplm.object.common.utils.DateUtil;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.attribute.ObjBizListColAttrDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.common.SysUserVO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.workflow.OaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.workflow.integratedcsbworkflow.*;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.entity.workflow.ObjWorkflowMapping;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.sys.SysUserService;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.common.enumeration.SysEventType;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.api.SdkSmWorkFlowClient;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.api.SdkSmWorkFlowConfClient;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.*;
import com.cvte.csb.toolkit.BooleanUtils;
import com.cvte.csb.toolkit.CollectionUtils;
import com.cvte.csb.workflow.common.dto.AuditLogDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.workflow.common.dto.CurrentNodeInfoDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.workflow.common.dto.RefuseNodeDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.workflow.common.dto.WorkflowBaseDTO;
import com.cvte.lcp.base.common.dto.workflow.TzcWorkflowDTO;
import com.cvte.lcp.base.common.dto.workflow.TzcWorkflowNodeDTO;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * @Description: 天舟云集成流程客户端
 * @Author: keliming
 * @Date: 2025/1/14
 */
@Service
@Slf4j
public class TzcIntegratedWfClient {

    @Autowired
    SdkSmWorkFlowClient sdkSmWorkFlowClient;

    @Autowired
    SdkSmWorkFlowConfClient sdkSmWorkFlowConfClient;

    @Autowired
    SysUserService sysUserService;


    private String getUserName(String loginAccount){
        SysUserVO userVo = sysUserService.getUserVo(loginAccount);
        if(userVo == null){
            throw new RuntimeException("用户不存在");
        }
        return userVo.getName();
    }


    /**
     * 获取当前流程节点信息
     *
     * @param workflowBaseDTO
     * @return
     */
    public List<CurrentNodeInfoDTO> getCurrentNodeInfoList(WorkflowBaseDTO workflowBaseDTO) {
        // 将WorkflowBaseDTO转换为SdkSmFormInfoReq
        SdkSmFormInfoReq formInfoReq = new SdkSmFormInfoReq();
        formInfoReq.setFormInstanceId(workflowBaseDTO.getFormInstanceId());
        formInfoReq.setLoginAccount(workflowBaseDTO.getAdAccount());
        formInfoReq.setLoginName(getUserName(workflowBaseDTO.getAdAccount()));


        // 调用天舟云接口获取当前节点信息
        List<SdkNodeInfoDTO> sdkNodeInfoDTOS = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.currentNodeInfo(formInfoReq);
        if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(sdkNodeInfoDTOS)) {
            log.info("getCurrentNodeInfoList is null, formInstanceId:{}", workflowBaseDTO.getFormInstanceId());
            return null;
        }

        // 将SdkNodeInfoDTO转换为CurrentNodeInfoDTO
        List<CurrentNodeInfoDTO> currentNodeInfoDTOS = new ArrayList<>();
        for (SdkNodeInfoDTO sdkNodeInfoDTO : sdkNodeInfoDTOS) {
            CurrentNodeInfoDTO currentNodeInfoDTO = new CurrentNodeInfoDTO();
            currentNodeInfoDTO.setNodeId(sdkNodeInfoDTO.getNodeId());
            currentNodeInfoDTO.setNodeName(sdkNodeInfoDTO.getNodeName());
            currentNodeInfoDTO.setHandlers(sdkNodeInfoDTO.getHandlers());
            currentNodeInfoDTO.setHandlerNames(sdkNodeInfoDTO.getHandlerNames());
            currentNodeInfoDTO.setDesc(sdkNodeInfoDTO.getDesc());
            currentNodeInfoDTOS.add(currentNodeInfoDTO);
        }

        return currentNodeInfoDTOS;
    }

    /**
     * 获取审批记录
     *
     * @param workflowBaseDTO
     * @return
     */
    public List<AuditLogDTO> getAuditLogList(WorkflowBaseDTO workflowBaseDTO) {
        // 将WorkflowBaseDTO转换为SdkSmFormInfoReq
        SdkSmFormInfoReq formInfoReq = new SdkSmFormInfoReq();
        formInfoReq.setFormInstanceId(workflowBaseDTO.getFormInstanceId());
        formInfoReq.setLoginAccount(workflowBaseDTO.getAdAccount());
        formInfoReq.setLoginName(getUserName(workflowBaseDTO.getAdAccount()));


        // 调用天舟云接口获取审批记录
        List<SdkSmAuditNoteDTO> auditNoteList = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.getAuditNoteList(formInfoReq);

        if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(auditNoteList)) {
            log.info("getAuditLogList is null, formInstanceId:{}", workflowBaseDTO.getFormInstanceId());
            return null;
        }

        // 将SdkSmAuditNoteDTO转换为AuditLogDTO
        List<AuditLogDTO> auditLogDTOS = new ArrayList<>();
        for (SdkSmAuditNoteDTO sdkSmAuditNoteDTO : auditNoteList) {
            AuditLogDTO auditLogDTO = new AuditLogDTO();
            auditLogDTO.setAuditNote(sdkSmAuditNoteDTO.getHandlerReason() );
            auditLogDTO.setNodeName(sdkSmAuditNoteDTO.getHandleNode());
            auditLogDTO.setActionKey(sdkSmAuditNoteDTO.getHandleType());
            auditLogDTO.setHandlerName(sdkSmAuditNoteDTO.getHandlerName());
            auditLogDTO.setHandlerAdAccount(sdkSmAuditNoteDTO.getHandlerUser());
            auditLogDTO.setHandleDate(DateUtil.dateTimeToDate(DateUtil.longToDateTime(sdkSmAuditNoteDTO.getHandleDate())));
            auditLogDTOS.add(auditLogDTO);
        }

        return auditLogDTOS;

    }


    /**
     * 获取当前用户可操作权限按钮
     *
     * @param workflowBaseDTO
     * @return
     */
    public List<OaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO> getOperationList(WorkflowBaseDTO workflowBaseDTO) {
        // 将WorkflowBaseDTO转换为SdkSmFormInfoReq
        SdkSmFormInfoReq formInfoReq = new SdkSmFormInfoReq();
        formInfoReq.setFormInstanceId(workflowBaseDTO.getFormInstanceId());
        formInfoReq.setLoginAccount(workflowBaseDTO.getAdAccount());
        formInfoReq.setLoginName(getUserName(workflowBaseDTO.getAdAccount()));


        // 调用天舟云接口获取当前用户可操作权限按钮
        final List<SdkSmEventBtnVo> sdkSmEventBtnVos = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.operationList(formInfoReq);

        if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(sdkSmEventBtnVos)) {
            log.info("getOaOperationList is null, formInstanceId:{}", workflowBaseDTO.getFormInstanceId());
            return null;
        }

        // 将SdkSmEventBtnVo转换为OaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO
        List<OaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO> oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTOS = new ArrayList<>();
        for (SdkSmEventBtnVo sdkSmEventBtnVo : sdkSmEventBtnVos) {
            OaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO = new OaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO();


            if ("submit".equals(sdkSmEventBtnVo.getCode())) {
                oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setOperationType("SUBMIT");
            }
            else if (sdkSmEventBtnVo.getCode().contains("pass")) {
                oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setOperationType("PASS");
            }
            else if (sdkSmEventBtnVo.getCode().contains("refuse")) {
                oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setOperationType("REFUSE");
            }
            else if ((sdkSmEventBtnVo.getCode().contains("commission"))) {
                oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setOperationType("COMMISSION");
            }
            else if (sdkSmEventBtnVo.getCode().contains("return")) {
                oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setOperationType("REVOKE");
            }
            else if ((sdkSmEventBtnVo.getCode().contains("abandon"))) {
                oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setOperationType("ABANDON");
            }

            if(oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.getOperationType() == null){
                continue;
            }

            oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setOperationCode(sdkSmEventBtnVo.getCode());
            oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setOperationName(sdkSmEventBtnVo.getName());
            oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setCurrentStateCode(sdkSmEventBtnVo.getNodeCode());
            oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO.setOperationName(sdkSmEventBtnVo.getName());
            oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTOS.add(oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTO);
        }

        return oaWorkFlowOperationExtDTOS;
    }

    /**
     * 获取驳回节点列表
     *
     * @param workflowBaseDTO
     * @return
     */
    public List<RefuseNodeDTO> getRefuseNodeList(WorkflowBaseDTO workflowBaseDTO) {
        // 将WorkflowBaseDTO转换为SdkSmFormInfoReq
        SdkSmFormInfoReq formInfoReq = new SdkSmFormInfoReq();
        formInfoReq.setFormInstanceId(workflowBaseDTO.getFormInstanceId());
        formInfoReq.setLoginAccount(workflowBaseDTO.getAdAccount());
        formInfoReq.setLoginName(getUserName(workflowBaseDTO.getAdAccount()));


        // 调用天舟云接口获取驳回节点列表
        List<SdkSmCurrentNodeInfoDTO> refuseNodeList = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.getRefuseNodeList(formInfoReq);

        if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(refuseNodeList)) {
            log.info("getRefuseNodeList is null, formInstanceId:{}", workflowBaseDTO.getFormInstanceId());
            return null;
        }

        // 将SdkNodeInfoDTO转换为RefuseNodeDTO
        List<RefuseNodeDTO> refuseNodeDTOS = new ArrayList<>();
        for (SdkSmCurrentNodeInfoDTO sdkNodeInfoDTO : refuseNodeList) {
            RefuseNodeDTO refuseNodeDTO = new RefuseNodeDTO();
            refuseNodeDTO.setId(sdkNodeInfoDTO.getNodeId());
            refuseNodeDTO.setName(sdkNodeInfoDTO.getNodeName());
            refuseNodeDTO.setDesc(sdkNodeInfoDTO.getDesc());
            refuseNodeDTOS.add(refuseNodeDTO);
        }

        return refuseNodeDTOS;
    }

    /**
     * 转办
     *
     * @param dto
     */
    public void commission(OaWorkFlowCommissionDTO dto) {
        // 将OaWorkFlowCommissionDTO转换为SdkSmCommissionReq
        SdkSmCommissionDTO commissionDTO = new SdkSmCommissionDTO();
        commissionDTO.setLoginAccount(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount());
        commissionDTO.setLoginName(getUserName(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount()));
        commissionDTO.setFormInstanceId(dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
        commissionDTO.setNodeCode(dto.getCurrentNode());
        commissionDTO.setFromAccount(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount());
        commissionDTO.setFromUserName(getUserName(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount()));
        commissionDTO.setToAccount(dto.getWorkflowTransfer().getToOtherHandlerAdAccount());
        commissionDTO.setComment(dto.getWorkflowAudit().getAuditNote());
        commissionDTO.setToUserName(getUserName(dto.getWorkflowTransfer().getToOtherHandlerAdAccount()));
        commissionDTO.setApproveCode(SysEventType.HANDLER_COMMISSION.getCode());
        commissionDTO.setApproveName(SysEventType.HANDLER_COMMISSION.getName());
        Integer commission = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.commission(commissionDTO);
        if (commission == 0) {
            log.error("commission error, formInstanceId:{}", dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
            throw new RuntimeException("转办失败!");
        }
    }


    /**
     * 驳回
     *
     * @param dto
     */
    public void refuse(OaWorkFlowRefuseDTO dto) {
        // 将OaWorkFlowRefuseDTO转换为SdkSmRefuseReq
        SdkSmRefuseDTO refuseDTO = new SdkSmRefuseDTO();
        refuseDTO.setFormInstanceId(dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
        refuseDTO.setLoginAccount(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount());
        refuseDTO.setLoginName(getUserName(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount()));
        refuseDTO.setNodeCode(dto.getCurrentNode());
        refuseDTO.setComment(dto.getWorkflowAudit().getAuditNote());
        refuseDTO.setToNodeCode(dto.getWorkflowRefuseParam().getJumpToNodeId());
        refuseDTO.setToNodeName(dto.getWorkflowRefuseParam().getJumpToNodeName());
        refuseDTO.setApproveCode(SysEventType.HANDLER_REFUSE.getCode());
        refuseDTO.setApproveName(SysEventType.HANDLER_REFUSE.getName());
        Integer refuse = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.refuse(refuseDTO);
        if (refuse == 0) {
            log.error("refuse error, formInstanceId:{}", dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
            throw new RuntimeException("驳回失败!");
        }
    }

    /**
     * 通过
     *
     * @param dto
     * @return
     */
    public List<ObjBizListColAttrDTO> pass(OaWorkFlowPassDTO dto) {
        // 将OaWorkFlowPassDTO转换为SdkSmPassReq
        SdkSmPassDTO passDTO = new SdkSmPassDTO();
        passDTO.setFormInstanceId(dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
        passDTO.setLoginAccount(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount());
        passDTO.setLoginName(getUserName(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount()));
        passDTO.setNodeCode(dto.getCurrentNode());
        passDTO.setComment(dto.getWorkflowAudit().getAuditNote());
        passDTO.setApproveCode(SysEventType.PASS.getCode());
        passDTO.setApproveName(SysEventType.PASS.getName());
        passDTO.setDataMap(dto.getDataMap());
        Integer pass = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.pass(passDTO);
        if (pass == 0) {
            log.error("pass error, formInstanceId:{}", dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
            throw new RuntimeException("通过失败!");
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * 废弃
     */
    public void abandon(OaWorkFlowAbandonDTO dto) {
        // 将WorkflowBaseDTO转换为SdkSmAbandonReq
        SdkSmAbandonDTO abandonDTO = new SdkSmAbandonDTO();
        abandonDTO.setFormInstanceId(dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
        abandonDTO.setLoginAccount(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount());
        abandonDTO.setLoginName(getUserName(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount()));
        abandonDTO.setComment(dto.getWorkflowAudit().getAuditNote());
        abandonDTO.setNodeCode(dto.getCurrentNode());
        if (BooleanUtils.isTrue(dto.getTzAdminAbandon())) {
            // 管理员废弃
            abandonDTO.setApproveCode(SysEventType.ADMIN_ABANDON.getCode());
            abandonDTO.setApproveName(SysEventType.ADMIN_ABANDON.getName());
        } else {
            // 草稿人废弃
            abandonDTO.setApproveCode(SysEventType.DRAFTER_ABANDON.getCode());
            abandonDTO.setApproveName(SysEventType.DRAFTER_ABANDON.getName());
        }
        Integer abandon = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.abandon(abandonDTO);
        if (abandon == 0) {
            log.error("abandon error, formInstanceId:{}", dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
            throw new RuntimeException("废弃失败!");
        }
    }

    /**
     * 撤回
     *
     * @param dto
     */
    public void revoke(OaWorkFlowRevokeDTO dto) {
        // 将OaWorkFlowRevokeDTO转换为SdkSmRevokeReq
        SdkSmRevokeDTO revokeDTO = new SdkSmRevokeDTO();
        revokeDTO.setFormInstanceId(dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
        revokeDTO.setLoginAccount(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount());
        revokeDTO.setLoginName(getUserName(dto.getWorkflowBase().getAdAccount()));
        revokeDTO.setNodeCode(dto.getCurrentNode());
        revokeDTO.setApproveCode(SysEventType.DRAFTER_RETURN.getCode());
        revokeDTO.setApproveName(SysEventType.DRAFTER_RETURN.getName());
        Integer revoke = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.revoke(revokeDTO);
        if (revoke == 0) {
            log.error("revoke error, formInstanceId:{}", dto.getWorkflowBase().getFormInstanceId());
            throw new RuntimeException("撤回失败!");
        }

    }


    /**
     * 创建流程实例
     *
     * @param stateMachineName
     * @param transactionId
     */
    public void create(String stateMachineName, String transactionId, String loginAccount, String loginName, String title,String formId,String formName) {
        SdkSmCreateDTO sdkSmCreateDTO = new SdkSmCreateDTO();
        sdkSmCreateDTO.setFormInstanceId(transactionId);
        sdkSmCreateDTO.setLoginAccount(loginAccount);
        sdkSmCreateDTO.setLoginName(loginName);
        sdkSmCreateDTO.setSystemCode("CPLM-OBJECT");
        sdkSmCreateDTO.setWorkflowCode(stateMachineName);
        sdkSmCreateDTO.setTitle(title);
        sdkSmCreateDTO.setFormId(formId);
        sdkSmCreateDTO.setFormName(formName);
        Integer process = sdkSmWorkFlowClient.createProcess(sdkSmCreateDTO);
        if (process == 0) {
            log.error("create error, formInstanceId:{}", transactionId);
            throw new RuntimeException("创建流程失败!");
        }
    }


    /**
     * 获取流程定义
     * <p>
     * * @return
     */
    public String createWorkflow(ObjWorkflowMapping workflowMapping) {
        //将ObjWorkflowMapping转换为SdkSmTemplateDTO
        SdkSmTemplateDTO sdkSmTemplateDTO = new SdkSmTemplateDTO();
        sdkSmTemplateDTO.setName(workflowMapping.getName());
        sdkSmTemplateDTO.setCode(workflowMapping.getApiName());
        sdkSmTemplateDTO.setDescri(workflowMapping.getDescription());
        sdkSmTemplateDTO.setSystemCode("CPLM-OBJECT");


        Integer template = sdkSmWorkFlowConfClient.createTemplate(sdkSmTemplateDTO);
        if (template == 1) {
            return sdkSmTemplateDTO.getCode();
        } else {
            log.error("createWorkflow error, workflowMapping:{}", workflowMapping);
            throw new RuntimeException("创建流程定义失败!");
        }
    }

    /**
     * 获取流程定义
     * <p>
     * * @return
     */
    public void updateWorkflow(ObjWorkflowMapping workflowMapping) {
        //将ObjWorkflowMapping转换为SdkSmTemplateDTO
        SdkSmTemplateDTO sdkSmTemplateDTO = new SdkSmTemplateDTO();
        sdkSmTemplateDTO.setName(workflowMapping.getName());
        sdkSmTemplateDTO.setCode(workflowMapping.getApiName());
        sdkSmTemplateDTO.setDescri(workflowMapping.getDescription());
        sdkSmTemplateDTO.setSystemCode("CPLM-OBJECT");
        sdkSmTemplateDTO.setIsEnabled(workflowMapping.getIsEnabled());


        Integer template = sdkSmWorkFlowConfClient.updateTemplate(sdkSmTemplateDTO);
        if (template != 1) {
            log.error("updateWorkflow error, workflowMapping:{}", workflowMapping);
            throw new RuntimeException("更新流程定义失败!");
        }

    }

    public List<TzcWorkflowNodeDTO> getNodeList(String workflowCode) {
        //将ObjWorkflowMapping转换为SdkSmTemplateDTO
        TzcWorkflowDTO workflowDTO = new TzcWorkflowDTO();
        workflowDTO.setWorkflowCode(workflowCode);
        return sdkSmWorkFlowConfClient.getNodeList(workflowDTO);
    }


}

```


#### 四、融合流程事件 (**按需选择**)


```
当流程发生变化时，通过本机制把流程发生的事项通知业务系统
```


1、继承节点事件回调插件 SdkSmEventNodePlugin
 节点进入退出时，流程引擎回调该插口


```
package com.cvte.cplm.object.core.tzc.plugin.IntegratedWf;

import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.event.ChangeEventDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.entity.change.ObjChange;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.change.ObjChangeService;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.event.ObjEventDispatcher;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.event.impl.ObjEventBuilder;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.common.enumeration.SysNodeEnum;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmEventNotifyReq;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.plugin.SdkSmEventNodePlugin;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.util.Optional;

/**
 * @Description: 集成工作流节点事件回调
 * @Author: keliming
 * @Date: 2025/1/13
 */
@Service
@Slf4j
public class EventNodePluginImpl extends SdkSmEventNodePlugin {
    @Autowired
    private ObjChangeService objChangeService;

    @Autowired
    private ObjEventDispatcher objEventDispatcher;

    @Override
    public int handleNodeEvent(SdkSmEventNotifyReq sdkSmEventNotifyReq) {
//        // 转异步处理事件
//        CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
//            try {
//                Thread.sleep(1000);
//            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
//                throw new RuntimeException(e);
//            }
//            handleEventInternal(sdkSmEventNotifyReq);
//        });
        return handleEventInternal(sdkSmEventNotifyReq);
    }

    private int handleEventInternal(SdkSmEventNotifyReq sdkSmEventNotifyReq) {
//        if (WorkflowStatus.DISCARD.name().equals(sdkSmEventNotifyReq.getProcessData().getStatus())
//                || WorkflowStatus.CLOSE.name().equals(sdkSmEventNotifyReq.getProcessData().getStatus())
//                || (WorkflowStatus.SUSPEND.name().equals(sdkSmEventNotifyReq.getProcessData().getStatus())
//                && !SysNodeEnum.DRAFT.getCode().equals(sdkSmEventNotifyReq.getNodeCode()))
        if (!SysNodeEnum.DRAFT.getCode().equals(sdkSmEventNotifyReq.getNodeCode()) &&
                !SysNodeEnum.START.getCode().equals(sdkSmEventNotifyReq.getNodeCode())) {
            try {
                ObjChange objChange = getObjChangeWithRetry(sdkSmEventNotifyReq.getFormInstanceId());
                String nodeId = Optional.ofNullable(sdkSmEventNotifyReq.getNodeCode())
                        .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("天舟云集成工作流节点事件回调，节点编码为空！"));
                ChangeEventDTO changeEventDTO = ChangeEventDTO.builder()
                        // 回调后FactNodeId是空的,如果为空就取WorkitemId, 起草节点FactNodeId是空的
                        .nodeId(nodeId)
                        .currentAccount(sdkSmEventNotifyReq.getOperatorAccount())
                        .objChange(objChange)
                        .build();
                objEventDispatcher.dispatchEvent(ObjEventBuilder.createWfChangeStatusAfterEvent(nodeId,
                        objChange, changeEventDTO));
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("EventNodePluginImpl has exception:" + e.getMessage(), e);
                throw e;
            }
        }
        return 0;
    }

    private ObjChange getObjChangeWithRetry(String changeId) {
        ObjChange objChange = null;
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            objChange = objChangeService.get(changeId);
            if (objChange != null) {
                return objChange;
            } else {
                try {
                    Thread.sleep(500);
                } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                    log.error("getObjChangeWithRetry, sleep error: " + e.getMessage(), e);
                    Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
                }
            }
        }
        log.info("查询不到变更对象[{}]", changeId);
        throw new IllegalStateException(String.format("执行变更回写事件异常，查询不到变更对象：%s", changeId));
    }
}

```


2、继承工作流操作事件回调 SdkSmEventOperationPlugin
 流程审批操作时，流程引擎回调该插口
参考实现


```
package com.cvte.cplm.object.core.tzc.plugin.IntegratedWf;

import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmEventNotifyReq;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.plugin.SdkSmEventOperationPlugin;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

/**
 * @Description: 集成工作流操作事件回调
 * @Author: keliming
 * @Date: 2025/1/13
 */
@Service
public class EventOperationPluginImpl extends SdkSmEventOperationPlugin {
    @Override
    public int handleOperationEvent(SdkSmEventNotifyReq sdkSmEventNotifyReq) {
        return 0;
    }
}

```


3、继承工作流更新事件回调 SdkEventUpdatePlugin
 工作流状态变化时，流程引擎回调该插口


参考代码


```
package com.cvte.cplm.object.core.tzc.plugin.IntegratedWf;

import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.common.utils.StringUtilsEx;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.common.MessageService;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.event.ObjEventDispatcher;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.event.ObjEventType;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.event.impl.ObjEventBuilder;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.common.enumeration.SysNodeEnum;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmEventNotifyReq;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.plugin.SdkEventUpdatePlugin;
import com.cvte.csb.wfp.api.sdk.dto.WfCallbackTodo;
import com.cvte.lcp.base.common.dto.workflow.LcpWorkItem;
import com.cvte.lcp.base.common.enums.workflow.WorkflowStatus;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.scheduling.concurrent.ThreadPoolTaskExecutor;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * @Description: 集成工作流更新事件回调
 * @Author: keliming
 * @Date: 2025/1/13
 */
@Service
@Slf4j
public class EventUpdatePluginImpl extends SdkEventUpdatePlugin {

    @Autowired
    private MessageService messageService;


    @Autowired
    private ObjEventDispatcher objEventDispatcher;


    @Autowired
    private ThreadPoolTaskExecutor executor;


    @Override
    public int handleUpdateEvent(SdkSmEventNotifyReq sdkSmEventNotifyReq) {
        // 转异步处理事件
        CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
            try {
                Thread.sleep(1000);
            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
                log.error("tzc handleUpdateEvent callback error", e);
                Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            }
            realtimeInfoCallback(sdkSmEventNotifyReq);
        }, executor);
        return 0;
    }


    public void realtimeInfoCallback(SdkSmEventNotifyReq dto) {
        log.info("doc_callback_info:{}", JSONObject.toJSONString(dto));
        try {
            this.handleRealTimeInfo(dto);
            log.info("doc_callback_success:{}", dto.getFormInstanceId());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error(String.format("doc_callback_err:%s", e.getMessage()), e);
            // 天舟云流程是同步处理，不用发送邮件通知
            // messageService.sendEmailMsg("流程文档状态实时回调报错邮件：" + dto.getFormInstanceId(), e.getMessage());
            throw new RuntimeException("TZC流程异步回调发生错误：" + e.getMessage(), e);
        } catch (Throwable e) {
            log.error(String.format("doc_callback_err_throwable:%s", e.getMessage()));
            throw new RuntimeException("TZC流程异步回调发生错误：" + e.getMessage(), e);
        }
        return;
    }

    /**
     * 处理流程文信息回调信息
     *
     * @param dto
     * @return
     * @
     */
    public void handleRealTimeInfo(SdkSmEventNotifyReq dto) {
        // 根据流程文档状态触发相应的处理事件
        ObjEventType eventType;
        if (WorkflowStatus.DISCARD.name().equals(dto.getProcessData().getStatus())) {
            eventType = ObjEventType.INSTANCE_ABANDON;
        } else if (WorkflowStatus.SUSPEND.name().equals(dto.getProcessData().getStatus())) {
            if (SysNodeEnum.DRAFT.getCode().equals(dto.getNodeCode())) {
                eventType = ObjEventType.INSTANCE_DRAFT;
            } else {
                eventType = ObjEventType.INSTANCE_SUBMIT;
            }
        } else if (WorkflowStatus.CLOSE.name().equals(dto.getProcessData().getStatus())) {
            eventType = ObjEventType.INSTANCE_END;
        } else {
            eventType = null;
        }

        WfCallbackTodo wfCallbackTodo = new WfCallbackTodo();
        wfCallbackTodo.setSrcFormId(dto.getFormInstanceId());
        if(dto.getProcessData()!=null&& StringUtilsEx.isNotBlank(dto.getProcessData().getTitle())){
            wfCallbackTodo.setDocSubject(dto.getProcessData().getTitle());
        }

        List<WfCallbackTodo.WorkitemModel> workflowItems = new ArrayList<>();
        dto.getProcessData().getWorkItems().forEach(workItem -> {
            WfCallbackTodo.WorkitemModel workitemModel = new WfCallbackTodo.WorkitemModel();
            workitemModel.setNodeId(workItem.getNodeId());
            workitemModel.setNodeName(workItem.getNodeName());
            workitemModel.setHandlerAccount(workItem.getHandlerAccounts());
            workflowItems.add(workitemModel);
        });

        String currentHandler = dto.getProcessData().getWorkItems().stream().map(LcpWorkItem::getHandlerNames).collect(Collectors.joining(","));
        wfCallbackTodo.setCurrentHandler(currentHandler);
        wfCallbackTodo.setCurrentNode(workflowItems.stream().map(WfCallbackTodo.WorkitemModel::getNodeName).collect(Collectors.joining(",")));
        wfCallbackTodo.setWorkitems(workflowItems);


        objEventDispatcher.dispatchEvent(ObjEventBuilder.createObjWorkflowEvent(eventType, wfCallbackTodo, dto.getOperatorAccount(), dto.getWorkflowCode()));


    }


}

```


#### 五、对接天舟云配置


1、天舟云流程引擎域名指定
 Apollo变量
 sm.workflow.url


```
 sit环境:   https://lcpsit.gz.cvte.cn/app
 uat环境:  https://lcpuat.gz.cvte.cn/app
 pro环境:  https://lcp.gz.cvte.cn/app

```


2、增加请求头（**必需**）
继承 SdkSmHttpRequestInterceptorPlugin


参考实现


```
package com.cvte.cplm.object.core.tzc.config;

import com.cvte.csb.iac.IACManager;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.plugin.SdkSmHttpRequestInterceptorPlugin;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;

import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * @Description:
 * @Author: keliming
 * @Date: 2025/1/17
 */
@Component
public class TzcSmSdkConfig extends SdkSmHttpRequestInterceptorPlugin {

    @Value("${appId}")
    String appId;

    @Value("${appSecret}")
    String secret;

    @Value("${sm.workflow.tenantId:c9a8ac72-483a-44c5-892e-74428e7010c3}")
    String tenantId;

    @Override
    public Map<String, String> getHeaderMap() {
        Map<String, String> headerMap = new HashMap<>();
        headerMap.put("x-iac-token", getIacToken());
        headerMap.put("x-tenant-id", tenantId);
        return headerMap;
    }

    public String getIacToken() {
        try {
            return IACManager.getAccessToken(appId, secret);
        } catch (Exception ex) {
            throw new RuntimeException("获取IAC Token失败:" + ex.getMessage(), ex);
        }
    }
}

```


#### 六、融合流程配置能力(**非必需**)


**1、字典翻译** (**非必需**)
 流程配置时获取字段的可选项


[图片1: null]


实现插件类 SdkSmDictPlugin


参考代码


```
package com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.statemachine.impl;

import com.cvte.cplm.object.common.constants.BizConstants;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.common.constants.Constants;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.common.utils.StringUtilsEx;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.converter.DictConverter;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dp.utils.ValueUtils;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.common.DictQueryDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.common.DictionaryDetailDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.common.migration.DictionaryTypeDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.entity.dictionary.DictionaryItem;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.dictionary.DictionaryItemService;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.dictionary.ObjDictionaryService;
import com.cvte.csb.core.exception.client.params.ParamsIncorrectException;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmDictSearchDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmDictStaticDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.plugin.SdkSmDictPlugin;
import com.cvte.csb.toolkit.CollectionUtils;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * cplm融合天舟云流程设计能力：字典翻译插件实现，转换成天舟云字典返回的数据格式
 * @Author lidiliang
 */
@Service
public class SdkSmDictPluginImpl implements SdkSmDictPlugin {
    @Autowired
    private ObjDictionaryService objDictionaryService;
    @Autowired
    private DictionaryItemService dictionaryItemService;

    @Value("${sdk.sm.dict.max.item4select.attr:500}")
    int maxDictItemCount4SelectAttr;

/**
     * 静态数据字典
     *返回值：
     * 树形字典
     * "CPLM_MATERIAL_MACHIN_TYPE": [
     *                 {
     *                     "code": "10",
     *                     "name": "AI"
     *                     "children": [
     *                         {
     *                             "code": "11",
     *                             "name": "AXIAL/卧式",
     *                         }
     *                     ]
     *                 }
     *             ]
     *
     *   静态非树形字典
     *   "BSM_USER_SEX": [
     *                 {
     *                     "code": "1",
     *                     "name": "男"
     *                 },
     *                 {
     *                     "code": "2",
     *                     "name": "女"
     *                 }
     *             ]
     *
     *
     *
     * @param dictStaticDTO
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public Map<String, List> batchDictList(SdkSmDictStaticDTO dictStaticDTO) {
        if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(dictStaticDTO.getApiNameList())) {
            return Collections.emptyMap();
        }
        Map<String, List> resultMap = new HashMap<>(dictStaticDTO.getApiNameList().size());
        // 批量查询字典类型的定义
        Map<String, DictionaryTypeDTO> dictCode2TypeMap = ValueUtils.toMap(
                objDictionaryService.selectByCodeList(dictStaticDTO.getApiNameList(), null),
                DictionaryTypeDTO::getCode);
        for (String dictTypeCode : dictStaticDTO.getApiNameList()) {
            // 校验是否静态字典
            DictionaryTypeDTO mapDetail = dictCode2TypeMap.get(dictTypeCode);
            if(mapDetail == null) {
                throw new ParamsIncorrectException(String.format("数据字典%s不存在", dictTypeCode));
            }
            String syncUrl = mapDetail.getAttribute1();
            if (StringUtilsEx.isNotBlank(syncUrl) && !BizConstants.STRING_NULL.equals(syncUrl)) {
                // 字典明细查询条件
                DictionaryItem itemCountReq = new DictionaryItem();
                itemCountReq.setDictionaryTypeCode(dictTypeCode);
                itemCountReq.setIsDeleted(Constants.STRING_FALSE);
                int count = dictionaryItemService.selectCount(itemCountReq);
                if (count > maxDictItemCount4SelectAttr) {
                    throw new ParamsIncorrectException(String.format("字典类型编码：%s 不是静态字典；修改建议：此字典只能用于搜索类型属性。", dictTypeCode));
                }
                // 直接捞取全部字典明细列表
                List<DictionaryItem> itemList = dictionaryItemService.select(itemCountReq);
                List<DictionaryDetailDTO> dictDtoList = ValueUtils.convert(itemList, DictConverter.INSTANCE::toDictDto);
                resultMap.put(dictTypeCode, dictDtoList);
                return resultMap;
            }
            // 查询全部字典值列表
            DictQueryDTO queryDTO = DictQueryDTO.builder().apiName(dictTypeCode).build();
            Map<String, Object> dictContentMap = objDictionaryService.getByApiName(dictTypeCode, queryDTO);
            List dataList = (List) dictContentMap.get(BizConstants.STRING_CONTENT);
            if (dataList == null || dataList.isEmpty()) {
                dataList = Collections.emptyList();
            }
            // 构造成天舟云字典返回的数据格式
            resultMap.put(dictTypeCode, dataList);
        }
        return resultMap;
    }

 /**
     * 动态数据字典
     * 返回值格式
     * 正向翻译 code->name
     *   "aaf0f063a9a64ebf8f9bd318624e89c9": [
     *                 {
     *                     "code": "aaf0f063a9a64ebf8f9bd318624e89c9",
     *                     "name": "PRD-000010"
     *                 }
     *             ]
     *  反向翻译 name->code
     *
     *  "PRD-0": [
     *                 {
     *                     "code": "55e3eea09c46443c81eec6187fcee5f7",
     *                     "isEnabled": "1",
     *                     "name": "PRD-000001",
     *                 },
     *                 {
     *                     "code": "9074946ab9b045a683a5658e856631e6",
     *                     "name": "PRD-000002"
     *                 }
     *          ]
     * @param smDictSearchDTO
     * @return
     */
    @Override
    public Map<String, List> search(SdkSmDictSearchDTO smDictSearchDTO) {
        com.cvte.lcp.base.common.dto.form.dict.DictQueryDTO dictQuery = smDictSearchDTO.getDictQuery();
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(dictQuery.getApiName())) {
            return Collections.emptyMap();
        }
        DictQueryDTO reqDTO = new DictQueryDTO();
        reqDTO.setApiName(dictQuery.getApiName());
        reqDTO.setCode(dictQuery.getCode());
        reqDTO.setName(dictQuery.getName());
        reqDTO.setNameList(dictQuery.getNameList());
        reqDTO.setPageSize(dictQuery.getPageSize());
        reqDTO.setPage(dictQuery.getPage());
        reqDTO.setPageFlag(dictQuery.getPageFlag());
        reqDTO.setExParamMap(dictQuery.getExtMap());
        Map<String, Object> resultMap = objDictionaryService.syncToCsbPost(dictQuery.getApiName(), reqDTO);
        Map<String, List> content = (Map<String, List>) resultMap.get(BizConstants.STRING_CONTENT);
        return content;
    }

}

```


**2、字段定义** (**非必需**)
 流程配置时拿到表单字段数据


[图片2: null]


字段定义查询插件实现 SdkSmFieldPlugin


参考实现


```
package com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.statemachine.impl;

import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.attribute.ObjAttributeDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.attribute.ObjAttributeGroupDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.entity.subclass.ObjClass;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.entity.workflow.ObjWorkflowMapping;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.attribute.ObjAttributeConfService;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.subclass.ObjClassService;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.workflow.ObjWorkflowMappingService;
import com.cvte.csb.core.exception.client.params.ParamsIncorrectException;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmFormFieldDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmFormFieldGroupDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmFormInfoDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.plugin.SdkSmFieldPlugin;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * cplm融合天舟云流程设计能力：字段定义查询插件实现，需要转换字段类型为天舟云的定义。
 * @author lidiliang
 */
@Service
@Slf4j
public class SdkSmFieldPluginImpl implements SdkSmFieldPlugin {
    @Autowired
    private ObjWorkflowMappingService objWorkflowMappingService;
    @Autowired
    private ObjClassService objClassService;
    @Autowired
    private ObjAttributeConfService objAttributeConfService;

    @Override
    public List<SdkSmFormFieldGroupDTO> formFieldAll(SdkSmFormInfoDTO sdkSmFormInfoReq) {
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(sdkSmFormInfoReq.getTemplateCode())) {
            throw new ParamsIncorrectException("templateCode不能为空");
        }
        // 1. 根据流程模板templateCode，查询pdm配置的工作流apiName
        ObjWorkflowMapping workflowMapping = objWorkflowMappingService.getDetailByApiName(sdkSmFormInfoReq.getTemplateCode(),null);
        if (workflowMapping == null) {
            throw new ParamsIncorrectException(String.format("未找到工作流[%s]的配置", sdkSmFormInfoReq.getTemplateCode()));
        }

        // 2. 再获取它关联对象的分类
        if (StringUtils.isBlank(workflowMapping.getClassId())) {
            log.info("工作流[{}]未关联对象分类", sdkSmFormInfoReq.getTemplateCode());
            return Collections.emptyList();
        }

        ObjClass objClass = objClassService.get(workflowMapping.getClassId());
        if (objClass == null) {
            throw new ParamsIncorrectException(String.format("未找到对象分类[%s]的配置", workflowMapping.getClassId()));
        }

        // 3. 获取分类的属性配置（封面属性+受影响物件属性）：分组+属性列表的结构
        // 无分组的属性给定一个默认分组（DEFAULT_GROUP）, 受影响物件给定一个默认分组（AFFECTED_ITEM_GROUP）--参考枚举Pdm2LcpGroupEnum
        List<ObjAttributeGroupDTO> attributeGroupList = objAttributeConfService.getObjAttributeGroupList4Lcp(objClass);

        // 4. 转换成天舟云的字段定义
        List<SdkSmFormFieldGroupDTO> resultList = new ArrayList<>(Math.max(attributeGroupList.size(), 1));
        for (ObjAttributeGroupDTO pdmGroup : attributeGroupList) {
            SdkSmFormFieldGroupDTO sdkGroup = new SdkSmFormFieldGroupDTO();
            resultList.add(sdkGroup);
            sdkGroup.setGroupName(pdmGroup.getName());
            sdkGroup.setGroupCode(pdmGroup.getId());
            List<SdkSmFormFieldDTO> fieldList = new ArrayList<>(pdmGroup.getAttributeDtoList().size());
            sdkGroup.setFieldList(fieldList);
            for (ObjAttributeDTO pdmAttrDto : pdmGroup.getAttributeDtoList()) {
                SdkSmFormFieldDTO sdkField = new SdkSmFormFieldDTO();
                // 全部返回属性apiName，避免不同环境手工配置id不一样的影响问题
                sdkField.setCode(pdmAttrDto.getApiName());
                sdkField.setName(pdmAttrDto.getName());
                sdkField.setAttrType(ObjAttributeDTO.mapAttrType(pdmAttrDto.getAttrType()));
                sdkField.setDictId(pdmAttrDto.getDictId());
                fieldList.add(sdkField);
            }
        }
        // 返回结果
        return resultList;
    }

}

```


返回数据JSON参考


```
[
    {
        "groupCode": "F_MO_LIST",
        "groupName": "基本信息-工单",
        "groupType": null,
        "fieldList": [
            {
                "code": "LOT_NUMBER",
                "name": "生产批次",
                "attrType": "TEXT",
                "dictId": null
            },
            {
                "code": "LOT_NUMBER_VALIDITY",
                "name": "批次是否有效",
                "attrType": "SELECT",
                "dictId": "CPLM_OBJ_COMM_YESNO",
            },
            {
                "code": "MO_ONLINE_DATE",
                "name": "上线日期",
                "attrType": "DATE",
                "dictId": null
            },
            {
                "code": "MO_PROD_MODEL",
                "name": "产品型号",
                "attrType": "SEARCH",
                "dictId": "PRODUCT_MODEL"
            },
            {
                "code": "CO_LINK",
                "name": "更改单链接",
                "attrType": "TEXT",
                "dictId": null
            }
        ]
    }
]
```


可选的attrType


```
/** 单行文本 */
TEXT
/** 多行文本 */
TEXTAREA
/** 数字 */
INT
/** 日期 */
DATE
/** 单选框 */
RADIO
/** 复选框 */
CHECKBOX
/** 下拉单选 */
SELECT
/** 下拉多选 */
MULTI_SELECT
/** 单选搜索 */
SEARCH
/** 多选搜索 */
MULTI_SEARCH
/** 树形单选 */
TREE
/** 树形多选 */
MULTI_TREE
/** 人员单选 */
PERSON
/** 人员多选 */
MULTI_PERSON
/** 日期区间 */
DATE_RANGE
/** 组织单选 */
ORGANIZTION
/** 组织多选 */
MULTI_ORGANIZTION
/** 树形单选搜索 */
TREE_SEARCH
/** 树形多选搜索 */
MULTI_TREE_SEARCH
```


**3、字段值查询** (**非必需**)


流程条件、流程动态审核人机制 需要拿字段值时，使用该机制。
实现插件类 SdkSmFieldValuePlugin


参考代码


```
package com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.statemachine.impl;

import com.cvte.cplm.object.common.constants.BizConstants;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.common.enums.statemachine.Pdm2LcpGroupEnum;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.common.utils.StringUtilsEx;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dp.utils.ValueUtils;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.attribute.ObjAttributeDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.attribute.ObjAttributeGroupDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.attribute.ObjBizListInstanceDetailDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.scheme.ObjSchemeUsedDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.scheme.ObjSchemeUsedTagDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.dto.version.ObjAffectedSearchDTO;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.entity.change.ObjChange;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.attribute.ObjAttributeConfService;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.change.ObjChangeService;
import com.cvte.cplm.object.core.service.version.ObjVersionService;
import com.cvte.csb.core.exception.client.params.ParamsIncorrectException;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmFieldValueDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.dto.SdkSmFormInfoDTO;
import com.cvte.csb.statemachine.sdk.plugin.SdkSmFieldValuePlugin;
import com.cvte.csb.toolkit.CollectionUtils;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * cplm融合天舟云流程设计能力：表单字段值查询插件实现
 * @author lidiliang
 */
@Slf4j
@Service
public class SdkSmFieldValuePluginImpl implements SdkSmFieldValuePlugin {
    @Autowired
    private ObjChangeService objChangeService;
    @Autowired
    private ObjAttributeConfService objAttributeConfService;
    @Autowired
    private ObjVersionService objVersionService;

  /**
  单个字段值
    入参:
{
     "bizId":"表单唯一标识"
    "formInstanceId": "单据id",
    "fieldCode": "格式：分组编码.字段编码,例    BASIC_INFO_GROUP.PROJECT_MANAGER"
}

    出参:
{
    "BASIC_INFO_GROUP": {
        "PROJECT_MANAGER": "字段值"
    }
}
  */
    @Override
    public Map<String, Object> getFieldValue(SdkSmFieldValueDTO fieldValueDTO) {
        // 根据表单实例formInstanceId+表单字段fieldCode查询表单字段值
        ObjChange objChange = objChangeService.get(fieldValueDTO.getFormInstanceId());
        if (objChange == null) {
            throw new ParamsIncorrectException(String.format("表单实例[%s]不存在", fieldValueDTO.getFormInstanceId()));
        }

        // fieldCode去掉分组前缀，得到属性apiName
        if (fieldValueDTO.getFieldCode() == null
                || !fieldValueDTO.getFieldCode().contains(BizConstants.SEP_DOT)) {
            throw new ParamsIncorrectException(String.format("fieldCode[%s]格式不正确", fieldValueDTO.getFieldCode()));
        }
        String[] fieldCodeArr = fieldValueDTO.getFieldCode().split(BizConstants.SPLIT_DECIMAL_POINT);
        String groupCode = fieldCodeArr[0];
        String attrApiName = fieldCodeArr[1];

        Map<String, Object> resultMap = new HashMap<>();
        if (Pdm2LcpGroupEnum.AFFECTED_ITEM_GROUP.getCode().equals(groupCode)) {
            // 受影响物件的属性
            ObjAffectedSearchDTO searchReq = new ObjAffectedSearchDTO();
            searchReq.setChangeId(objChange.getId());
            searchReq.setRequireAttrApiName(BizConstants.STRING_TRUE);
            List<Map<String, Object>> affectedItemListMap = objVersionService.getAffectedItemListData(searchReq);
            resultMap.put(Pdm2LcpGroupEnum.AFFECTED_ITEM_GROUP.getCode(), affectedItemListMap);
            return resultMap;
        }
        // 封面属性或明细表
        ObjSchemeUsedDTO schemeUsedDTO = matchSchemaDto4ObjAndBizValue(objChange);
        Map<String, Object> allObjGroupMap = new HashMap<>();
        buildObjAndBizAttrValue(schemeUsedDTO, allObjGroupMap);
        Object currentGroupAttrValue = allObjGroupMap.get(groupCode);
        log.info("currentGroupAttrValueMap:{}", currentGroupAttrValue);
        if (currentGroupAttrValue instanceof Map) {
            // 封面属性值
            Map currentGroupAttrValueMap = (Map) currentGroupAttrValue;
            return Collections.singletonMap(groupCode, Collections.singletonMap(attrApiName, currentGroupAttrValueMap.get(attrApiName)));
        } else {
            // 明细表属性
            List<Map<String, Object>> currentGroupAttrValueList = (List<Map<String, Object>>) currentGroupAttrValue;
            return Collections.singletonMap(groupCode, currentGroupAttrValueList);
        }
    }

/**
   一次性查所有字段值
    入参:
{
     "bizId":"表单唯一标识"
    "formInstanceId": "单据id"
}

    出参:
{
    "BASIC_INFO_GROUP": {
        "PROJECT_MANAGER": "字段值",
        "AI_MANAGER"："字段值2"
    }
}
  */
    @Override
    public Map<String, Object> getAllFieldValue(SdkSmFormInfoDTO formInfoDTO) {
        ObjChange objChange = objChangeService.get(formInfoDTO.getFormInstanceId());
        if (objChange == null) {
            throw new ParamsIncorrectException(String.format("表单实例[%s]不存在", formInfoDTO.getFormInstanceId()));
        }
        // 1. 根据表单实例formInstanceId查询表单所有的属性值和明细表
        ObjSchemeUsedDTO schemeUsedDTO = matchSchemaDto4ObjAndBizValue(objChange);

        // 2. 查询受影响物件列表
        ObjAffectedSearchDTO searchReq = new ObjAffectedSearchDTO();
        searchReq.setChangeId(objChange.getId());
        searchReq.setRequireAttrApiName(BizConstants.STRING_TRUE);
        List<Map<String, Object>> affectedItemListMap = objVersionService.getAffectedItemListData(searchReq);

        // 3. 聚合返回数据结构
        Map<String, Object> resultMap = new HashMap<>();
        buildObjAndBizAttrValue(schemeUsedDTO, resultMap);

        // 受影响物件属性值列表: code=属性id, value=属性值
        resultMap.put(Pdm2LcpGroupEnum.AFFECTED_ITEM_GROUP.getCode(), affectedItemListMap);

        // 4. 返回结果
        return resultMap;
    }

    private ObjSchemeUsedDTO matchSchemaDto4ObjAndBizValue(ObjChange objChange) {
        // 自动匹配界面方案
        ObjSchemeUsedDTO schemeUsedDTO = objAttributeConfService.autoMatchScheme(objChange.getClassId(), objChange.getId(), null, false);
        schemeUsedDTO.setId(objChange.getId());
        schemeUsedDTO.setSerialNumber(objChange.getSerialNumber());
        schemeUsedDTO.setStatus(objChange.getCurrentStatus());
        schemeUsedDTO.setOrgId(objChange.getOrgId());
        schemeUsedDTO.setOrgCode(objChange.getAttr01());
        // 组装内置、自定义属性值
        objChangeService.buildObjTagAttrValue(objChange, schemeUsedDTO, false);
        return schemeUsedDTO;
    }

    /**
     * 获取封面属性值、明细表属性值
     * @param schemeUsedDTO
     * @param resultMap
     */
    private void buildObjAndBizAttrValue(ObjSchemeUsedDTO schemeUsedDTO, Map<String, Object> resultMap) {
        // 封面属性值+明细表，code=属性apiName, value=属性值
        for (ObjSchemeUsedTagDTO tagDTO : schemeUsedDTO.getTagList()) {
            if (BizConstants.OBJ_TAG_AFFECTED_ITEMS.equals(tagDTO.getApiName())) {
                // 受影响物件属性值不在此方法处理范围内
                continue;
            }
            Map<String, Object> tagGroupAttrValueMap = (Map<String, Object>) resultMap.get(tagDTO.getApiName());
            if (tagGroupAttrValueMap == null) {
                tagGroupAttrValueMap = new HashMap<>();
                resultMap.put(tagDTO.getApiName(), tagGroupAttrValueMap);
            }

            // 页签无分组的属性值列表
            Map<String, Object> apiName2ValueMap = ValueUtils.toMap(tagDTO.getAttributeDtoList(),
                    f -> StringUtilsEx.isNotBlank(f.getValue()),
                    ObjAttributeDTO::getApiName, ObjAttributeDTO::getValue);
            if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(apiName2ValueMap)) {
                tagGroupAttrValueMap.putAll(apiName2ValueMap);
            }
            if (tagDTO.getAttributeGroupList() != null) {
                // 页签有分组的属性值列表
                for (ObjAttributeGroupDTO group : tagDTO.getAttributeGroupList()) {
                    Map<String, Object> tagGroupApiName2ValueMap = ValueUtils.toMap(group.getAttributeDtoList(),
                            f -> StringUtilsEx.isNotBlank(f.getValue()),
                            ObjAttributeDTO::getApiName, ObjAttributeDTO::getValue);
                    if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(tagGroupApiName2ValueMap)) {
                        tagGroupAttrValueMap.putAll(tagGroupApiName2ValueMap);
                    }
                }
            }

            // 页签有明细表：每个明细表独立一个分组
            if (tagDTO.getBizList() != null) {
                for (ObjBizListInstanceDetailDTO bizListDto : tagDTO.getBizList()) {
                    // 明细表属性值列表，返回结果：List<Map<String, Object>>
                    resultMap.put(bizListDto.getBizListApiName(),
                            bizListDto.getDetails() != null ? bizListDto.getDetails() : Collections.emptyList());
                }
            }
        }
    }
```


}

---
